name: EthGetThisValue32
title: EthGetThisValue32
description: This function reads the data of a received packet in Intel format.

It is only usable in a CAPL callback function that had been registered with EthReceiveRawPacket or EthReceivePacket. It depends on the callback function, which part of the packet data is accessed by the function:

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: byte offset relative to the beginning of a data packet or the payload (see description above)

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
